changes: ✨ Added Dancing Pet
🎨 Fixed Tab Bar theme mismatch
🧩 Added Home Screen Widgets (Beta)
🚀 Added Shortcut Launcher
⚡ Improved UI performance and reduced lag
🎞️ Disabled many unnecessary animations for a smoother experience
🐞 Various bug fixes and stability improvements
App version bumped to 2.6.5 (code 413)
New: Manual Wallpaper Theme — pick any photo from your gallery as the app background
Top tab bar and screen backgrounds turn transparent when a wallpaper is active, so it shows through everywhere
Window status bar and navigation bar already render fully transparent, now consistent with the wallpaper theme
Settings > Appearance > Manual Wallpaper — toggle on/off, change image anytime
New Blur slider (0–40dp) to manually control how soft the wallpaper looks
New Overlay Darkness slider to keep text/icons readable on bright photos
Wallpaper image is copied into app-private storage so it survives reboots without extra storage permissions
App version bumped to 2.6.4 (code 412)
Video player portrait/landscape button layout redesigned for better reachability
Lock button moved to bottom-left corner above seek bar
Audio track & subtitle auto-select based on device language
Action buttons (loop, scale, speed, rotate) no longer reset after app reopen — persisted via DataStore
Top navbar and window status bar now match selected theme color
Video player header background matches app theme
Home screen song duration now shown below artist name
3-dot menu added to all songs in home list with Play, Add to Queue, Add to Playlist, Share, Favorite options
MiniPlayer and Now Playing album art no longer resets to placeholder when song is paused
Video seek bar glitch fixed — no more flash/jump when scrubbing
Now Playing custom sleep timer — enter any minutes value instead of preset only
App version bumped to 2.6.2 (code 410)
Fixed update check not triggering — update.json version_code was 5 but app versionCode is 405
Updated update.json with correct version_code 406
Update check now works correctly from Home page and Settings
Removed 'App is up-to-date' toast that showed on every page switch — now silent auto-check
Library tabs (Songs, Albums, Artists, Playlists, Favorites) now auto-adjust to screen width
Added session-level flag to prevent re-checking updates on every home screen visit
Manual update button always forces a fresh check
Added video playback support
More stable UI with performance improvements
Fixed UI lag: replaced LaunchedEffect(index,offset) with snapshotFlow — no more 60fps recompositions during flings
Enhanced Update Dialog UI with numbered serial-wise changelog list
Added version badge and improved visual hierarchy in update dialog
Added contentType to LazyList itemsIndexed calls for better composition node reuse
Fixed MiniPlayer scroll detection lag in HomeScreen and LibraryScreen
Structured update.json with changelog[] array field for rich update notes
Improved OutlinedButton for dismiss action in update dialog
Fixed playlist songs not adding — AddToPlaylistDialog now properly wires to repository
Fixed song count showing 0 in playlists — real JOIN query replaces hardcoded value
Added full PlaylistDetailScreen with play, shuffle and remove-song support
Added AddSongsToPlaylistDialog with search and already-added indicators
Fixed Equalizer in Settings — now reads/writes levels via PlayerViewModel
Fixed Sleep Timer persistence — survives app close and reopen via DataStore
Fixed Clear Cache — properly clears Coil memory, disk cache and cacheDir
Added Changelog History screen fetching from GitHub
UI lag fixes: stable keys, contentType, snapshotFlow scroll batching
Neumorphic design system applied across all screens
Added AMOLED Purple, Cyan, Pink and Gold themes
Added sort by Name, Date Added, Duration, Size for song lists
MediaStore observer with 1.5s debounce for instant new-song detection
Crossfade transition toggle in Settings
Improved MiniPlayer with swipe-to-skip gesture
Horizontal pager tabs with zero-jank spring fling behavior
Rewrote UI with Jetpack Compose
Added ExoPlayer backend with MediaSession integration
Persistent playback notification with media controls
Favorites system with Room database
Recently Played and Most Played smart playlists
Album and Artist detail views with expandable song lists
Search screen with real-time debounced results
Initial public release of AB Player
Offline music player with MediaStore scanning
Basic play, pause, next, previous controls
Equalizer with 5-band control and presets
Playlist creation and management
Dark and Light theme support
